raw: {"perspective": "CTO Watchdog", "findings": [{"severity": "fail", "file_or_area": "frontend/src/components/Layout.jsx", "issue": "Incomplete enforcement of Energy Adaptation UI modes", "recommended_fix": "Update the Layout component to conditionally render based on the EnergyLevel state variable, ensuring all components adhere to the specified modes (Full, Mid, Low)"}, {"severity": "warn", "file_or_area": "frontend/src/context/ EnergyContext.js", "issue": "EnergyLevel state variable not consistently sourced from user profile or session context", "recommended_fix": "Standardize the sourcing of the EnergyLevel state variable to ensure consistency across the application"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["frontend/src/components/AssessmentWidget.jsx", "frontend/src/components/PublicProfile.jsx"]}

findings.issue: Incomplete enforcement of Energy Adaptation UI modes
findings.recommended_fix: Update the Layout component to conditionally render based on the EnergyLevel state variable, ensuring all components adhere to the specified modes (Full, Mid, Low)

findings.issue: EnergyLevel state variable not consistently sourced from user profile or session context
findings.recommended_fix: Standardize the sourcing of the EnergyLevel state variable to ensure consistency across the application
